scripts.pb:kill: pkill -f 'docker compose watch' || true; docker compose down
scripts.pb:credentials: mkdir -p .pocketbase && op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Email' > .pocketbase/adminUserEmail && op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Password' > .pocketbase/adminUserPassword && echo 'Credentials saved to .pocketbase/'
scripts.e2e: PB_ADMIN_EMAIL=$(cat .pocketbase/adminUserEmail 2>/dev/null || op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Email') PB_ADMIN_PASSWORD=$(cat .pocketbase/adminUserPassword 2>/dev/null || op read 'op://Private/localhost dev pocketbase admin user/Password') npx playwright test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run fe:review
